siteSubtitle: Tracking my academic journey at The University of Toledo.
about: I am beginning at The University of Toledo through Exploratory Studies while preparing for a future transition into Cyber Security. This page shares my academic progress, semester milestones, registered coursework, and later in the semester, grade updates.

courses.name: College Composition I
courses.description: Developing writing and communication skills for college and technical work.

courses.name: Introduction to Logic
courses.description: Developing formal reasoning and analytical thinking for future Cyber Security study.

courses.name: Managing Diversity in the Workplace
courses.description: Building teamwork, professionalism, and workplace awareness.

courses.name: Math Modeling Problem Solving
courses.description: Building quantitative reasoning and structured problem-solving skills.

courses.name: Orientation
courses.description: Building a strong foundation for success in college.

updates: Preparing for the first day of classes on August 31, 2026.
goals: Begin Fall 2026 with a strong academic foundation.
Build skills that support a future transition into Cyber Security.
Track course progress consistently throughout the semester.
